member.name: T:Library.SQLServer.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Library.SQLServer.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Library.SQLServer.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Library.SQLServer.Connection
member.summary: Handler the Oracle Connection Class ------------------------------------------- C.C.Yeon 25 April 2011 Initial Version
